title: Sources of Synergy: In a merger scenario, synergy is defined as the value...
summary: Evaluate synergy as the additional value created from combining two companies in a merger.
prompt: In a merger scenario, synergy is defined as the value created from the merger that exceeds the sum of the individual firms' values.
solution: Synergy is a key concept in M&A, representing the additional value generated from the combined operations of the merging companies, making the whole greater than the sum of its parts.
